title: Product Tech Lead (Digital Health platform)
description:
Product ownership

  • Own the product vision and roadmap for digital platforms
  • Translate real-world problems into clear product requirements 
  • Decide what to build, what not to build, and what to buy


Technology & delivery

  • Build and lead a small, high-quality team of engineers, product managers, and designers
  • Lead engineering and delivery as one integrated team
  • Make architectural and technical decisions that balance speed, safety, and scale
  • Be accountable for shipping reliable, secure products into live clinical environments


Platform & Vendor Management

  • Assess vendor proposals, architectural design, APIs, and integration plans; negotiate scope and ensure accountability to outcomes.
  • Ensure alignment with organisational digital governance, cybersecurity, and interoperability mandates.
  • Work closely with engineering and digital infrastructure teams to ensure seamless integration across platforms and services.

Collaboration

Work closely with:

  • IT partners on infrastructure, security, and integration
  • Operations teams on usability and day-to-day realities
  • Navigate constraints thoughtfully: healthcare is regulated, but innovation is still expected

Background

  • Bachelor’s degree in fields of Computer Science, Information System or Technology, or a related field
  • 8 years of experience in product, technology, or engineering roles
  • Experience leading end-to-end delivery of digital products
  • Demonstrated track record in the development and implementation of smart technologies, including digital health initiatives, AI-driven analytics across clinical, operational and facilities domains
  • Comfortable owning both product direction and technical execution
  • Proven ability to make trade-offs and move teams forward
  • Strong stakeholders’ management skills, patience and ability to handle uncertainty as we build the future architecture for care delivery.

Interested applicants please send your resume to venessagoh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Venessa Goh Wee Ni

R24124686

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No: 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
